tiny_practice.action: Close your eyes and imagine pouring out your most precious possession as an act of pure worship, just as Mary poured her expensive perfume on Jesus' feet

two_step.reflect_question: How can I demonstrate extravagant love and devotion to Jesus this week?

options.text: Give sacrificially to someone in need
options.response: Identify a specific person or cause to support financially
Set aside an hour for uninterrupted prayer and praise
Look for an opportunity to testify about Jesus' impact in my life

creative_prompt.instruction: Draw a picture of Jesus surrounded by people who deeply love and worship Him, showing different expressions of devotion

reevaluation.question: How has reading this chapter changed my understanding of worship and sacrifice?
options: I see worship as more than just singing
I understand the value of costly devotion
I recognize Jesus' worth more deeply
I'm challenged to love Jesus more genuinely

three_choice.question: Which profound moment most reveals Jesus' character in this chapter?

choices.expansion: Sacrificial love transcends practical economics and social expectations.
Spiritual awareness and purposeful surrender demonstrate divine intentionality.
Humanity's complexity in responding to transformative spiritual encounters.

socratic_nudge.question: If true worship requires total surrender, what 'costly perfume' are you withholding from your spiritual journey?

moral_slider.question: How do personal comfort and divine purpose intersect in suffering?

reevaluation.question: How has this chapter challenged your understanding of discipleship?

thematic_summaries.title: Sacrificial Worship
thematic_summaries.summary: Mary's costly anointing of Jesus demonstrates radical, unreserved devotion. Her act symbolizes complete surrender and recognition of Christ's impending sacrificial mission.

thematic_summaries.title: Divine Sovereignty in Redemption
thematic_summaries.summary: The chapter reveals Jesus' intentional movement toward crucifixion, demonstrating God's predetermined plan of salvation. Christ's words and actions show conscious alignment with the Father's redemptive purpose.

reevaluation.question: How does Jesus' approaching death challenge traditional messianic expectations?
options: The Messiah would triumph through apparent weakness
Divine victory occurs through sacrificial love
